pr.title: Track app-server start in ChatGPT telemetry
pr.body:
## Why
We want ChatGPT telemetry to receive app-server startup timing as its own signal instead of folding it into thread or turn telemetry. Keeping startup separate makes the later turn timing breakdown cleaner and gives us a direct measure of process start-to-ready latency.

## What changed
- add a dedicated `codex_app_server_started` analytics event and reducer/client plumbing in `codex-rs/analytics`
- measure startup duration and completion time in `codex-rs/app-server/src/lib.rs`
- add serialization and reducer coverage for the new event

## Verification
- `cargo check -p codex-analytics -p codex-app-server -p codex-core`
- `just fix -p codex-analytics -p codex-core`
pr.author: aibrahim-oai
